ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the tournament was held */,
  "host_country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country hosting the tournament */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "runner_up_id" INTEGER /* ID of the runner-up team */,
  "third_place_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that finished in third place */,
  "fourth_place_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that finished in fourth place */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total number of goals scored in the tournament */,
  "qualified_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams that qualified for the tournament */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played in the tournament */,
  "attendance" REAL /* Total attendance for the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the tournament started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the tournament ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_host_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_third_place_id FOREIGN KEY ("third_place_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_runner_up_id FOREIGN KEY ("runner_up_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_fourth_place_id FOREIGN KEY ("fourth_place_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent on which the country is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the continent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the team represents */,
  "team_type" TEXT /* Type of team (e.g., national, club) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament in which the match was played */,
  "team_a_id" INTEGER /* ID of team A */,
  "team_b_id" INTEGER /* ID of team B */,
  "team_a_goals" INTEGER /* Goals scored by team A */,
  "team_b_goals" INTEGER /* Goals scored by team B */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the match was played */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., group stage, knockout) */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Stage of the tournament (e.g., group stage, round of 16) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_a_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_a_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_b_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_b_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the venue is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the venue */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match in which the goal was scored */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that scored the goal */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who scored the goal */,
  "goal_time" TEXT /* Time when the goal was scored */,
  "goal_type" TEXT /* Type of goal (e.g., open play, penalty) */,
  "assist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who assisted the goal */,
  "own_goal" INTEGER /* Whether the goal was an own goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is on */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "appearances" INTEGER /* Number of appearances in World Cup matches */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored in World Cup matches */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player (in cm) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player (in kg) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, journalist, fan) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who left the comment */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
